firstConnect.title: Welcome — your raffle account is ready
firstConnect.body: Your gameplay happens at your raffle account {{sma}}, owned by your wallet {{eoa}}. You won't pay gas for raffle actions.

sweep.title: Move your SOF to your raffle account
sweep.body: You have {{amount}} SOF in your wallet. Move it to your raffle account to use it for gameplay. (You pay gas for this one-time transfer.)
